Hogwarts—c MEWS-II mva (H) m—m— s mum—~11 um '01anJomgfii’zimzzva)2211:), m mm 1* “i I Emcee—9mcg; 0‘3);ng 66/VOOE£"’I 'CI CM 'GUERI -- 1 of 2 -- llx.) 5.0. 1 so. 169(E) d certain matter 1987; And wh 1987 requirin And wh Central Govei And wh said Tribunal Now, th River Water [I Tribunal may 111E GAZETTEOF INDIA: EX'I'RAQRDIN’ARY [PQRT IIfShtt, 3(ii)1 MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCESWW WW NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th August, 2005 93(E).—Whereas the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources vide its notification number ated the 2nd April, 1986 constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal forverification and adjudication of s referred therein, and the said Tribunal forwarded its report to the Central Government on 30th January, ereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August g explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid; ereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report. the tnment extended the period ofmaking the said report, from time to time, till the 51h August, 2005; ereas, the Central Government keeping in View the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the , considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months after the 5th August, 2005; erefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the Inter-State isputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby further extends the period within which the forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 51h day ofFebruary, 2006, and for that purpose makes the following further amendment in the notification number S .0. 905 (E) dated the 5th August, 2003, namely :— In the s words, figure Note—The p No. S 2003 was e Augu id notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters "till the 5th day of August, 2005”, the and letters “till the 5th day of February, 2006” shall be substituted, [F. No. 15/3/8541] J.
